title: StaffTools
description: StaffTools is a powerful, flexible, and fully customizable moderation plugin designed for administrators who value convenience and full control.
body:
**StaffTools: Your universal set of moderation tools.**

_Tired of having to install dozens of plugins to perform basic moderation tasks? StaffTools solves this problem by providing a single, powerful and lightweight package that covers all the daily needs of a server administrator._

StaffTools is designed for Spigot and Paper 1.16.5 and offers intuitive commands and deep customization, allowing you to focus on community management rather than juggling plugins.

**Why choose StaffTools?**

**All in one place: **Forget about searching and configuring individual plugins to freeze, view inventory, or clear the chat. 

_StaffTools combines all these functions under one convenient shell, simplifying the management of your server._

**Maximum customization:** Every message your players see can be completely changed. Open the localization files and adjust the text and colors so that they perfectly match the style of your server.

**Multi-language support out of the box:** The plugin is ready to work with an international audience and includes full translations into Russian, English and Chinese. The language can be easily switched with a single command.

**Ease and productivity:** No unnecessary dependencies or heavy processes. 
StaffTools provides only the most necessary tools, ensuring minimal impact on your server's performance.

**_This plugin is designed for those who value stability, performance and full control._**
